name: imprint
description: Persistent memory for Codex and Claude Code. Captures observations, compresses with LLM, builds a knowledge graph, and exposes recall/search through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent local memory for Codex sessions.
interface.longDescription: Imprint runs a local Go server backed by SQLite, exposes MCP tools for memory search, recall, save, and graph queries, captures Codex hook events, and keeps a transcript watcher as a backfill path for local Codex sessions.
defaultPrompt: Search my Imprint memories for this project.
Save this decision to Imprint memory.
Recall prior architecture notes from Imprint.
